sql.if: AND ( a.feedback_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR a.score_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR o.feedback_content_1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR o.feedback_content_2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pq_opinion o INNER JOIN pq_answer a ON a.id = o.answer_id INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN pq_feature f ON f.id = o.feature_id WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pq_answer a INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id WHERE 1 = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pq_opinion o INNER JOIN pq_answer a ON a.id = o.answer_id INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN pq_feature f ON f.id = o.feature_id WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT o.id AS opinion_id, a.id AS answer_id, a.questionnaire_id, p.product_model, p.product_code, a.answer_time, a.recommend_score, a.user_category, o.opinion_seq, f.feature_name, o.sentiment_code AS sentiment, o.feedback_content_1, o.feedback_content_2, a.feedback_text, a.score_reason FROM pq_opinion o INNER JOIN pq_answer a ON a.id = o.answer_id INNER JOIN pq_product p ON p.id = a.product_id LEFT JOIN pq_feature f ON f.id = o.feature_id WHERE 1 = 1
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
